seo.title: Pricing — RankPilot
seo.description: Simple, transparent pricing for RankPilot. No hidden fees. Start your 14-day free trial today.

hero.headline: Simple,
hero.subheadline: No hidden fees. No per-seat surprises. Pick the plan that fits your workflow and start ranking.

plans.name: Starter
plans.desc: Perfect for solo content creators and freelancers getting started with SEO.

plans.name: Professional
plans.desc: For growing teams who need the full SEO content workflow in one place.

plans.name: Enterprise
plans.desc: For agencies and large teams needing advanced controls and dedicated support.

faqs.q: Can I switch plans at any time?
faqs.a: Yes. You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time from your account settings. Changes take effect immediately and are prorated.
Yes — all plans come with a 14-day free trial. No credit card required to start.

faqs.q: What counts as an "article" in the AI generator?
faqs.a: Each time you generate a full article using the AI Article Generator, it counts as one article. Outlines, edits, and regenerations of sections do not count.

faqs.q: Do you offer annual billing discounts?
faqs.a: Yes. Switching to annual billing saves you approximately 20% compared to paying month-to-month.

faqs.q: Can I add team members to my account?
faqs.a: Professional and Enterprise plans support multiple team members. Starter is designed for individual use.

faqs.q: What happens when I hit my article limit on Starter?
faqs.a: You'll be notified when you're close to your limit. You can upgrade to Professional at any time to get unlimited article generation.

cta.title: Start Your Free 14-Day Trial
cta.desc: No credit card required. Full access to all Professional features. Cancel anytime.
cta.trustLine: Trusted by 2,400+ SEO professionals and content teams
